bead.title: TD: axon backend integration design for bead tracker
bead.description: Author a Technical Design (TD) document for replacing the JSONL+flock+git bead backend with an axon-backed implementation. Cover: (a) data model mapping — how Bead structs and the events log map onto axon collections/streams; (b) claim/lock semantics — how 'claim a ready bead' becomes an axon op, including multi-worker fairness and cross-machine concurrency (Story 14 federation); (c) archive policy — how closed-bead externalization (.ddx/attachments + .ddx/beads-archive.jsonl per ADR-004) carries over; (d) JSONL interchange — keep bd/br import/export compatibility per FEAT-004; (e) failure modes and recovery; (f) migration story (forward refs to migration-tool child). Cite ADR-004/SD-004 and ddx-da11a34a (current lock-contention patch). Output the TD under docs/ at an appropriate path. No code changes.
bead.acceptance: 1. TD document committed under docs/. 2. Covers data model, claim/lock semantics, archive policy, JSONL interchange, failure modes, and migration story. 3. Cites ADR-004/SD-004 and ddx-da11a34a. 4. Identifies open questions and decisions needed before implementation.
